name: Simple Chicken Saute
recipeIngredient: 2 chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and remove all visible fat. Dry thoroughly.
2. Flatten slightly with the heel of your hand to achieve uniform thickness for even cooking.
3. Heat olive oil in a 10-inch non-stick skillet over medium heat.
4. Saute the chicken for 3 minutes on each side, or until firm to the touch. Remove chicken from the pan and keep warm.
5. Using the same skillet, saute the green onions until translucent.
6. Add mushrooms and cook for 2 minutes.
7. Stir in the lemon juice and bring to a simmer; cook until most of the liquid has evaporated.
8. Stir in the soft margarine.
9. Spoon the sauce over the chicken and sprinkle parsley on top.
Serves 2
Each serving provides:
255 calories, 3g carbohydrate, 28g protein, 155mg sodium, 6g fat, 68mg cholesterol.
